title: overpowered skepters (CANCELLED)
description:
from an 18 year old with mcreator and a dream
i bring you the modrinth upload from curseforge
body:
SO I AM CANCELLING THIS MOD AND BRINGING IT OVER TO MY UPCOMING MOD AS A SECTION


from a guy with mcreator and a dream i bring to you a reupload of my mainline mod!![OVERPOWERED SKEPTERS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ee68f3205450b988090d3cb77f75936118ecdea7.png)

a mod with new dimension, mobs, and ores and a brand new weapon type just for you to discover and a v2 in the works with much more and revamped textures

now this version is a bit old so i don't remember the crafting recipes so you might need just enough items 
what does this mod contain?

skepters the main center of the mod the skepters can be fused with the new ores

NEW ORES!! septus, handlite ignosis, purplite and a few more for you to discver yourself

these new ores bring new armor and a new weapon type

new biome the main one being biosis with a new wood type that looks... honestly not that great 

for builds and only meant to go with the biome

new dimension the skeptic dimension with a different type of grass and dirt (portal frame:hiosis block)

new mobs: skuttler, clattle, and the skeptic pig

even if you think it's kinda corny
atleast give it a chance for my first ever dive into mod creation

the orginal curseforge upload (don't worry im the same guy)
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/powerful-skepters](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/powerful-skepters)
